note: Per-field fill-value guidance (value type, required-ness, choice-group conditionals). Derived offline from schema/mapping/constraints; consistent with the fill engine. Not legal advice — verify against the official form before filing. Currency/time guidance is conservative because the printed '$'/AM-PM are not read here.

plaintiff.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

superior_court.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

district_court.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

county.guidance: A Maine county name without the word 'County' (e.g. Cumberland).

defendant.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

location_town.guidance: The court division / town where the case is filed.

mediation_conducted_pursuant_to_14_mrs_6.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

the_defendant_has_not_filed_an_answer_to.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

undefined.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

print_name.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).
